findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 41 findings from 7 agents into 32 unique findings. Removed 9 duplicates. Identified 4 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Primary KPI: Cart Abandonment Rate (score=4.042); Experiment Opportunity: One-Click Purchase Flow (score=4.042); North Star Metric: Checkout Conversion Rate (score=3.548); B2B Buyers Prioritize Reliability Over Features (score=3.5); Auto-apply best coupon feature for V1 (score=3.5)

top_priorities.title: North Star Metric: Checkout Conversion Rate
B2B Buyers Prioritize Reliability Over Features
Auto-apply best coupon feature for V1

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 4 conflicts between agent findings. competitive-001 vs feasibility-005: The implementation of the one-click checkout feature is hindered by critical mobile checkout crashes that need urgent attention.; feasibility-003 vs requirements-004: The recommendation to fix payment retry reliability is in conflict with the requirement to implement auto-apply best coupon, as both are critical and cannot be addressed simultaneously.; feasibility-004 vs requirements-007: The migration to a new payment gateway is a prerequisite that will block feature development, including the implementation of the one-click purchase feature.

evidence.excerpt: The implementation of the one-click checkout feature is hindered by critical mobile checkout crashes that need urgent attention.
The recommendation to fix payment retry reliability is in conflict with the requirement to implement auto-apply best coupon, as both are critical and cannot be addressed simultaneously.
The migration to a new payment gateway is a prerequisite that will block feature development, including the implementation of the one-click purchase feature.
Potential compliance issues with data handling practices may hinder the implementation of the one-click checkout feature, which requires secure handling of user data.

conflicts.description: The implementation of the one-click checkout feature is hindered by critical mobile checkout crashes that need urgent attention.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize fixing mobile checkout crashes before proceeding with the one-click checkout feature implementation.
conflicts.reasoning: User trust and functionality must be ensured before introducing new features that could exacerbate existing issues.

conflicts.description: The recommendation to fix payment retry reliability is in conflict with the requirement to implement auto-apply best coupon, as both are critical and cannot be addressed simultaneously.
conflicts.resolution: Address payment retry reliability first, then proceed with implementing the auto-apply best coupon feature.
conflicts.reasoning: Ensuring payment reliability is paramount to maintaining user trust, which must be prioritized over enhancing user experience with coupons.

conflicts.description: The migration to a new payment gateway is a prerequisite that will block feature development, including the implementation of the one-click purchase feature.
conflicts.resolution: Plan the migration to the new payment gateway first, ensuring that it is completed before starting on the one-click purchase feature.
conflicts.reasoning: The migration is critical for reducing transaction fees and improving support, which will ultimately benefit the one-click feature's performance.

conflicts.description: Potential compliance issues with data handling practices may hinder the implementation of the one-click checkout feature, which requires secure handling of user data.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a compliance audit and address any identified issues before implementing the one-click checkout feature.
conflicts.reasoning: Compliance with data protection regulations is critical and must be ensured to avoid legal repercussions and maintain user trust.

summary: Consolidated 41 findings into 32 unique items. Removed 9 duplicates, resolved 4 conflicts. Top priority: Primary KPI: Cart Abandonment Rate.
